news.title: Samsung's shares surge as much as 6% after company ships next-generation AI memory chip samples
news.detail: Shares of Samsung Electronics surged after the company began shipping HBM4E chip samples to its customers globally.

news.title: Nvidia is investing billions into this emerging technology that could change the AI industry
news.detail: Photonics is considered to be a more efficient alternative to the current process of transferring data using electricity, which could be crucial to the AI boom.

news.title: 药不对症！高油价扼住经济咽喉 亚洲各国央行激进加息难阻本币贬值
news.detail: 亚洲各国央行正采取越来越激进的加息措施以支撑本币汇率，但目前几乎看不到明显成效。在斯里兰卡央行5月22日意外大幅加息100个基点后，斯里兰卡卢比本周一度上涨逾1%...

news.title: Costco says it saw 'record-breaking' gas volumes amid rising prices
news.detail: Costco saw "recording-breaking volumes" of gas sales and said rising fuel prices drove first-time members to its stations.

news.title: Strait of Hormuz shutdown: A visual guide to world's most critical oil chokepoint
news.detail: Data shows how the outbreak of the Iran war in February and the closure of the Strait of Hormuz saw trade grind to a halt, triggering a severe global energy shock.

news.title: 港股午评：恒指涨1.11% 科指涨1.66% 科网股、内房股普涨 芯片股集体回调 联想大涨逾23% 碧桂园涨超19%
news.detail: 5月29日消息，港股三大指数高开高走。截至午间收盘，恒生指数涨1.11%，报25282.84，恒生科技指数涨1.66%，国企指数涨1.28%。盘面上，科网股普涨，联想涨超23%...

news.title: Anthropic tops OpenAI as most valuable AI startup, nears $1 trillion valuation in latest round
news.detail: Anthropic is now the most valuable AI company in Silicon Valley after a new $65 billion funding round.

news.title: 美伊停火协议倒计时？原油承压、黄金谨慎，市场聚焦特朗普最终批准
news.detail: 文章来源：汇通财经 大宗商品市场正受到美伊停火乐观情绪的压制。据美国媒体周四（5月28日）报道，双方已达成延长停火60天并重新开放霍尔木兹海峡的谅解备忘录...

news.title: 联想股价势创1999年以来最佳单月表现 投资者看好AI驱动的增长前景
news.detail: 联想集团股价本月以来已经上涨约一倍，势创1999年以来最大单月涨幅，投资者看好该公司由人工智能（AI）驱动的增长前景。

news.title: Americans’ savings rate falls to lowest level since 2022 as inflation outpaces paychecks
news.detail: As inflation starts outpacing wages again, Americans have less money to put aside for emergencies and other savings goals.
